title: CBN Refutes Misreporting on Forex Use in Oil Sector - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has noted some misreporting that falsely implies the Bank disbursed US$1.259 billion to major oil sector operators for the importation of refined petroleum products and related items. Such reporting is entirely inaccurate and misleading. The Bank noted that the referenced figure of US$1.259 billion, as published in the CBN’s
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has noted some misreporting that falsely implies the Bank disbursed US$1.259 billion to major oil sector operators for the importation of refined petroleum products and related items. Such reporting is entirely inaccurate and misleading.
